content_body:
To the homeowners,

I just wanted to let you know that I enjoyed my stay in your home so much last year that you were my first stop for my return trip. I was thrilled to give you my return business and booked immediately! Every time I look at my trip photos, I smile and have warm memories of laughing in your kitchen with my friends over dinner. I’ve made my first payment, and I’m eagerly awaiting September because of you. Thank you so much for opening up your beautiful home.

-Gillian
title: Eagerly Awaiting September
